records.stderr_pattern: OSError: \[Errno 98\] Address already in use|Address already in use
records.description: Port already in use — set PORT=0 to auto-select a free port, or change the port number

reproduction.command: python3 -c "import socket; s1=socket.socket(); s1.bind(('127.0.0.1',18765)); s1.listen(1); s2=socket.socket(); s2.bind(('127.0.0.1',18765))" 2>&1 || true
reproduction.fix_command: python3 -c "import socket; s=socket.socket(); s.bind(('127.0.0.1',0)); print('ok, port:', s.getsockname()[1]); s.close()" 2>&1 || true
